mapper.sql: id, organization_id, name, code, unit, is_paid, pay_rate, is_active, is_statutory_leave, statutory_type, requires_proof, proof_description, max_days_per_year, can_carryover, is_deleted, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by
mapper.select: SELECT FROM leave_types WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT FROM leave_types WHERE code = #{code} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO leave_types ( id, organization_id, name, code, unit, is_paid, pay_rate, is_active, is_statutory_leave, statutory_type, requires_proof, proof_description, max_days_per_year, can_carryover, is_deleted, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{organizationId}, #{name}, #{code}, #{unit}, #{isPaid}, #{payRate}, #{isActive}, #{isStatutoryLeave}, #{statutoryType}, #{requiresProof}, #{proofDescription}, #{maxDaysPerYear}, #{canCarryover}, 0, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE leave_types SET organization_id = #{organizationId}, name = #{name}, code = #{code}, unit = #{unit}, is_paid = #{isPaid}, pay_rate = #{payRate}, is_active = #{isActive}, is_statutory_leave = #{isStatutoryLeave}, statutory_type = #{statutoryType}, requires_proof = #{requiresProof}, proof_description = #{proofDescription}, max_days_per_year = #{maxDaysPerYear}, can_carryover = #{canCarryover}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: UPDATE leave_types SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
